text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! Out on a morning run, C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you could say that! But enough about me...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What?! B-but I'll hardly be a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You never know if you don't try. Don't you
love to run?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Something tells me you can't live without it. Just
my thought after observing you.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
When you run, it's like you're living for that
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and I understand. I feel the freest on the
turf.
